title: Deploy Adarshpatel Marketing Site with WhatsApp Integration

requirements.summary: Finalize the current build for live deployment with verified enquiry form submission to backend and WhatsApp chat integration
acceptanceCriteria: The enquiry form on the Contact section accepts and validates user input.
On successful form submission, the backend canister records the enquiry.
After submission, the browser opens a WhatsApp link pre-filled with the enquiry details directed to +91 8431628989.
All existing sections (Hero, Navbar, DairyFeed, AgriInputs, CoffeeTrading, Contact, Footer) render correctly.
The site is accessible and functional in a deployed environment.

file_operations.description: Verify and ensure the contact form submission handler correctly calls the backend submitEnquiry method and opens a WhatsApp chat link to +91 8431628989 with pre-filled enquiry details (name, phone, product, message) on successful submission. Confirm form validation is working and error states are handled appropriately.

Verify the useSubmitEnquiry mutation hook correctly invokes the backend submitEnquiry method with the four required parameters (name, phone, product, message) and properly invalidates the enquiries query cache on success to ensure data consistency.

Verify all sections (Navbar, Hero, DairyFeedSection, AgriInputsSection, CoffeeTradingSection, ContactSection, Footer) are properly composed and rendered in the correct order. Ensure smooth-scroll behavior works for internal navigation and all section IDs are correctly referenced.

Verify the hero section correctly uses the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1600x700.png and that CTA buttons properly scroll to the products and contact sections. Ensure the AP logo image reference is correct.

Verify the navbar correctly uses the generated AP logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/ap-logo.dim_256x256.png and that all navigation links (Home, Products, Coffee Trading, Contact) properly scroll to their target sections. Confirm mobile menu functionality works correctly.

Verify the dairy feed section correctly uses the generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/dairy-feed-bg.dim_800x400.png and that enquiry buttons properly scroll to the contact section with the correct section ID.

Verify the agricultural inputs section correctly uses the generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/agri-inputs-bg.dim_800x400.png and that enquiry buttons properly scroll to the contact section with the correct section ID.

Verify the coffee trading section correctly uses the generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/coffee-bg.dim_800x400.png and that enquiry buttons properly scroll to the contact section with the correct section ID.

Verify the footer displays correct contact information including phone number +91 8431628989, email, and address. Ensure quick navigation links properly scroll to their target sections and that the copyright notice is current.
